description: Hard-banned topics for the Aegis synthetic case generator. The SafetyRedactor stage is a binary hard gate: if any banned topic surfaces in the generated case, the case is discarded and the ScenarioPlanner re-rolls a new matrix cell. Confirmed full list by PM on 2026-05-27.

banned_topics.label: Suicide and suicidal ideation
banned_topics.rationale: PM hard rule. Demo and dataset must not include suicide content.
deterministic_patterns: (?i)\b(suicide attempt|attempted suicide|overdose with intent|overdose to end (his|her|their) life)\b
banned_topics.llm_check_guidance: Flag any narrative that frames the patient as having recently attempted to end their life, having active SI, or framing the case around suicidality. Substance use without SI is allowed.

banned_topics.label: Non-suicidal self-injury and self-harm
banned_topics.rationale: Distinct from suicide but emotionally charged; not appropriate for a demo dataset.
banned_topics.llm_check_guidance: Flag content describing patient deliberately injuring themselves. Mentions of accidental injury are fine.

banned_topics.label: Child abuse, neglect, or pediatric maltreatment
banned_topics.rationale: Sensitive content not appropriate for a public hackathon demo.
deterministic_patterns: (?i)\b(child abuse|child neglect|child maltreatment|pediatric (sexual )?abuse|CPS report|mandated report|battered child)\b
banned_topics.llm_check_guidance: Flag any case that hinges on documentation of abuse or where the appeal context discusses abuse history. Pediatric medical cases without abuse context are fine.

banned_topics.label: Intimate partner violence and domestic violence
banned_topics.rationale: Sensitive content not appropriate for a public hackathon demo.
deterministic_patterns: (?i)\b(domestic violence|intimate partner violence|IPV|battered (wife|spouse|partner)|abuser|stalking by ex|spousal abuse)\b
banned_topics.llm_check_guidance: Flag any case framed around IPV history or current abuse. Trauma history in general (war, accident, single-event PTSD) is acceptable.

banned_topics.label: End-of-life decisions, hospice withdrawal, DNR disputes
banned_topics.rationale: Avoid politically and ethically loaded end-of-life narratives in the demo dataset.
deterministic_patterns: (?i)\b(end[- ]?of[- ]?life|hospice (denial|withdrawal)|DNR (dispute|order)|physician[- ]?assisted|right to die|terminal extubation|withdrawal of life support)\b
banned_topics.llm_check_guidance: Flag appeals framed around continuing or withdrawing life-sustaining treatment, or anything involving hospice eligibility / withdrawal. Curative oncology cases that do NOT involve EOL framing are fine.

banned_topics.label: Gender-affirming care for minors
banned_topics.rationale: Politically charged. Hard exclude from the demo dataset. Adult gender-affirming care is also out of scope for the MVP demo.
banned_topics.llm_check_guidance: Flag any case involving gender-affirming care for any patient under 26 OR explicitly framed around gender dysphoria. Other womens-health or endocrine cases without this framing are fine.

banned_topics.label: Violence, vigilantism, or polarizing public events around insurance
banned_topics.rationale: AGENTS.md root rule. No invocations of violence or polarizing public events around the insurance industry in any artifact.
banned_topics.llm_check_guidance: Flag any narrative that references or alludes to violence against insurance company employees, executives, or polarizing real-world events from the insurance industry. Frustration tone in the patient's narrative is acceptable; calls to harm are not.

banned_topics.label: Medicare, Medicaid, TRICARE, VA, ACA marketplace subsidies
banned_topics.rationale: MVP scope: commercial plans only. Including out-of-scope programs would mislead the model and confuse the demo.
banned_topics.llm_check_guidance: Flag any case framed around Medicare/Medicaid/TRICARE/VA/marketplace coverage. Only employer-sponsored commercial plans (Aetna, Cigna, UHC) are in scope. The pattern is permissive of the word 'Medicare-eligible' only if the case explicitly states the patient is still on employer commercial coverage; the LLM check confirms.
